title: dendrolobium triangulare
intro: Dendrolobium triangulare, also known as the Three-angled Dendrolobium or Three-angled Pea, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dendrolobium triangulare include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction by boiling its leaves and stems in water, and it is also used in herbal teas and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
